subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful and pure, believing, steadfast leaves, through God's bounty, thousands upon thousands of princesses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن و ورقات طیبه موقنه مطمئنه بفضل یزدان هزاران هزار دختران شهریاران
subcodes.subjects: @monasticism; asceticism, @high station of the true believer, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
